deploy.title: Deploy to Staging
deploy.description: Deploy the current branch to the staging environment, run smoke tests, and report status.

incident-response.title: Incident Response
incident-response.description: Triage production incidents — gather logs, identify root cause, and coordinate the fix.

query-builder.title: Query Builder
query-builder.description: Build and optimize SQL queries for the analytics data warehouse.

provision-env.title: Provision Environment
provision-env.description: Provision cloud infrastructure using Terraform — VPCs, databases, and compute resources.

component-review.title: Component Review
component-review.description: Review React components for accessibility, design system compliance, and performance.

lint-fix.title: Lint & Fix
lint-fix.description: Run ESLint with auto-fix on staged files and report remaining issues.

format-check.title: Format Check
format-check.description: Check code formatting with Prettier and fix any violations.
